name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America Plainfield, Indiana — Advance America offers payday loans ($100-$500), installment loans ($100-$1,000), and title loans ($2,000-$25,000)...
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized, fully accredited lender specializing in short-term emergency cash loans. The company operates physical storefronts across multiple states, including this Jacksonville, Florida location at 1020-14 N. Edgewood Ave, and offers online lending options for customer convenience.

The company provides three main loan products: payday loans (2-4 week terms, $100-$500), installment loans with longer repayment periods ($100-$1,000), and title loans secured by vehicle collateral ($2,000-$25,000). All products are available through in-store visits or online applications. The Jacksonville store operates extended hours (9am-6pm weekdays, 9am-4pm Saturdays) and offers bilingual customer service in Spanish. Advance America also provides Western Union services at this location.

The company distinguishes itself through high customer satisfaction ratings (4.9 out of 5 stars based on 125,640 reviews) and emphasis on quick approval and funding. Staff are positioned as trained to help customers select appropriate loan products. The company targets customers needing immediate cash between paychecks or for emergency expenses, marketing the speed and accessibility of their lending process.

As a traditional payday and title loan lender, Advance America serves customers who may lack access to traditional bank loans but should be aware that these products typically carry high APRs and short repayment terms. Customers should carefully review loan terms and their ability to repay before borrowing, as missed payments can lead to debt cycles and additional fees.
pros: Same-day loan funding available ($100-$500 payday, $100-$1,000 installment loans)
Title loans offer substantially higher amounts ($2,000-$25,000) based on vehicle equity
Extended store hours (9am-6pm weekdays, including Saturday morning)
Multiple application channels (online, phone pre-qualification, in-store)
High customer satisfaction rating (4.9/5 stars from 125,640 reviews)
Additional services including Western Union money transfers
cons: Payday loans limited to $500 maximum with 2-4 week repayment term, typical of high-APR short-term debt
Title loans require vehicle ownership and title as collateral, risking vehicle loss if unable to repay
No APR or fee information disclosed on website, making cost comparison difficult
Installment loans capped at $1,000, requiring title loan alternative for larger amounts
Target market suggests lending to subprime borrowers who may struggle with debt cycles
best_for: Workers needing cash to bridge to next paycheck without access to traditional credit
Vehicle owners facing unexpected expenses who can quickly repay a title loan
Borrowers unable to qualify for bank personal loans due to credit history or income documentation
Spanish-speaking customers in Jacksonville seeking bilingual financial services
diagnosis: Advance America is best for employed individuals with immediate short-term cash needs who have acceptable credit or collateral (vehicle) and can repay within weeks to months. The critical caveat is that payday and title loans carry substantially higher costs than traditional personal loans or credit lines; borrowers should exhaust alternatives and carefully verify repayment ability before applying, as default can trigger expensive debt cycles or vehicle repossession.
services: Installment loans ($100-$1,000 with extended repayment periods)
Title loans ($2,000-$25,000 secured by vehicle collateral)

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
